Uses of Class
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTableCell

  • Uses of PotTableCell in cc.quaternion.potshaper

    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper that return PotTableCell
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.align(PotAlignment alignment)
    Sets the horizontal text alignment for all paragraphs within the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.appendText(String text, boolean newLine)
    Appends text to the end of the cell's current content.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.bold()
    Applies bold styling to all text runs within the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.bold(boolean bold)
    Enables or disables bold styling for all text runs within the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.border(PotBorder border)
    Applies the same border style to all four sides of the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.borderBottom(PotBorder border)
    Applies a border style to the bottom edge of the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.borderLeft(PotBorder border)
    Applies a border style to the left edge of the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.borderRight(PotBorder border)
    Applies a border style to the right edge of the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.borderTop(PotBorder border)
    Applies a border style to the top edge of the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTable.cell(int row, int col)
    Returns a wrapper for the cell at the specified row and column indices.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.clearText()
    Removes all text content from the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.fill(PotColor color)
    Sets the background fill color of the cell using a PotColor.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.fill(Color color)
    Sets the background fill color of the cell using a standard AWT Color.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.font(PotFont font)
    Applies multiple font properties from a PotFont object to all text runs within the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.fontColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the font color for all text runs within the cell using a PotColor.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.fontColor(Color color)
    Sets the font color for all text runs within the cell using a standard AWT Color.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.fontFamily(String family)
    Sets the font family for all text runs within the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.fontSize(double size)
    Sets the font size for all text runs within the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.italic()
    Applies italic styling to all text runs within the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.italic(boolean italic)
    Enables or disables italic styling for all text runs within the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.noBorder()
    Removes all borders from the cell by setting their widths to zero.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.noFill()
    Removes the background fill from the cell, making it transparent.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.padding(double padding)
    Applies uniform padding to all four sides of the cell's content area.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.padding(double top, double right, double bottom, double left)
    Sets individual padding values for each side of the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.setText(String text)
    Sets the plain text content of the cell, replacing any existing text.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.textDirection(PotDirection direction)
    Sets the text direction (writing mode) for the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.underline(boolean underline)
    Enables or disables underline styling for all text runs within the cell.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.verticalAlign(PotVerticalAlignment alignment)
    Sets the vertical alignment of text within the cell.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<PotTableCell>
    PotTable.PotTableColumn.cells()
    Returns a list of all cells in this column.
    List<PotTableCell>
    PotTable.PotTableRow.cells()
    Returns a list of all cells in this row.
